name: beacon-opencode
description: Beacon — semantic code search for OpenCode (replaces grep with hybrid search)

scripts.build: bun build ./beacon.ts --outdir dist --target bun --sourcemap=external --external hnswlib-node --external onnxruntime-node && bun build ./src/lib/embedder-worker.ts --outdir dist --entry-naming embedder-worker.js --target bun --sourcemap=external
scripts.dev: bun build ./beacon.ts --outdir dist --target bun --sourcemap=external --external hnswlib-node --external onnxruntime-node --watch & bun build ./src/lib/embedder-worker.ts --outdir dist --entry-naming embedder-worker.js --target bun --sourcemap=external --watch
scripts.prepublishOnly: bun run clean && bun run build && bunx tsc --project tsconfig.build.json && rm -rf dist/src
